title: "Directionless" at Hauser & Wirth Menorca — until 25 October
location: Hauser & Wirth Menorca, Illa del Rei (Maó harbour)
description: The group show coordinated by Rashid Johnson brings together more than twenty international artists — Charles Gaines, Firelei Báez and Cristina Iglesias among them — on the Illa del Rei, alongside the sculpture trail and Piet Oudolf's garden. Open until 25 October, when the gallery closes its season: one of the best art reasons for an October on the island. Reached by boat from Maó harbour; opening times and boat schedules on the gallery's website.
